narrative:
14 Ohio Senate district has 235,865 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.1 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -7.3% D−R vs -26.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
